news.title:
RBI's draft proposes asset size-based criteria for upper layer NBFCs, replacing parametric scoring.
Entities like IRFC, REC, and HUDCO may qualify under the new framework; stricter governance rules proposed.
news.summary:
RBI's draft proposes asset size-based criteria for upper layer NBFCs, replacing parametric scoring.
Entities like IRFC, REC, and HUDCO may qualify under the new framework; stricter governance rules proposed.

news.title:
NTPC announces full operation of 1,000 MW Tehri PSP, boosting renewable power. HUDCO and NBCC sign MoUs for urban renewal and real estate development.
L&T Realty acquires IGSL for ₹1,123 cr; AstraZeneca plans to sell Bengaluru plant for ₹3,400 cr. Zaggle partners Generali, and Shalby expands kidney transplant services.
news.summary:
NTPC announces full operation of 1,000 MW Tehri PSP, boosting renewable power. HUDCO and NBCC sign MoUs for urban renewal and real estate development.
L&T Realty acquires IGSL for ₹1,123 cr; AstraZeneca plans to sell Bengaluru plant for ₹3,400 cr. Zaggle partners Generali, and Shalby expands kidney transplant services.

news.title:
HUDCO signed 2 MoUs with NBCC for redevelopment projects in Delhi.
HUDCO to fund and NBCC to manage; MoUs valid for 2 years with review clause.
news.summary:
HUDCO signed 2 MoUs with NBCC for redevelopment projects in Delhi.
HUDCO to fund and NBCC to manage; MoUs valid for 2 years with review clause.

news.title:
Housing & Urban Development Corp fined ₹4.6L +18% GST for board composition non-compliance.
Delay due to govt's late independent director appointments; fine rises daily until compliance.
news.summary:
Housing & Urban Development Corp fined ₹4.6L +18% GST for board composition non-compliance.
Delay due to govt's late independent director appointments; fine rises daily until compliance.

news.title: HUDCO, Zaggle, and IREDA highlighted for strong growth outlook in midcap radar.
news.summary: HUDCO, Zaggle, and IREDA highlighted for strong growth outlook in midcap radar.

news.title:
HUDCO's loan sanctions rose 28.8% in FY25-26 to ₹1,64,757 Cr.
Loan disbursements increased 27.9% to ₹51,194 Cr; data provisional.
news.summary:
HUDCO's loan sanctions rose 28.8% in FY25-26 to ₹1,64,757 Cr.
Loan disbursements increased 27.9% to ₹51,194 Cr; data provisional.

news.title:
Housing & Urban Development Corp declares Rs 12 dividend; ex-date is Mar 27, 2026.
Short-term returns are negative, but 3-5 year returns show significant growth.
news.summary:
Housing & Urban Development Corp declares Rs 12 dividend; ex-date is Mar 27, 2026.
Short-term returns are negative, but 3-5 year returns show significant growth.

news.title:
HUDCO paid Rs. 207.5 Cr interest on its 8.37% Fully Serviced Bond Series VI 2018.
Payment was made on 25-03-2026 via IndusInd Bank; record date was 10-03-2026.
news.summary:
HUDCO paid Rs. 207.5 Cr interest on its 8.37% Fully Serviced Bond Series VI 2018.
Payment was made on 25-03-2026 via IndusInd Bank; record date was 10-03-2026.

news.title:
Housing & Urban Development Corp declares ₹1.25/share interim dividend; record date is Mar 28, 2026.
The company plans to borrow up to ₹70,000 crore for FY 2026-27.
news.summary:
Housing & Urban Development Corp declares ₹1.25/share interim dividend; record date is Mar 28, 2026.
The company plans to borrow up to ₹70,000 crore for FY 2026-27.

news.title:
Housing & Urban Development Corp board to discuss 4th interim dividend for FY26.
Record date for the dividend is under review.
news.summary:
Housing & Urban Development Corp board to discuss 4th interim dividend for FY26.
Record date for the dividend is under review.

news.title:
HUDCO board meeting on 23rd March 2026 to consider 4th interim dividend FY 2025-26.
HUDCO to approve annual borrowing plan FY 2026-27; trading window closed till 25th March.
news.summary:
HUDCO board meeting on 23rd March 2026 to consider 4th interim dividend FY 2025-26.
HUDCO to approve annual borrowing plan FY 2026-27; trading window closed till 25th March.

news.title:
HUDCO confirms interest payment of Rs. 209.5 Cr on 7.37% Taxable NCDs Series F issued under ISIN INE031A08947.
Payment made on due date, 12-03-2026, via IDFC First Bank to bondholders per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
HUDCO confirms interest payment of Rs. 209.5 Cr on 7.37% Taxable NCDs Series F issued under ISIN INE031A08947.
Payment made on due date, 12-03-2026, via IDFC First Bank to bondholders per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
HUDCO confirms Rs. 206.8 Cr interest payment for 2011 Tax-Free Bonds Series 2 on 05.03.2026.
Payment processed via IDFC First Bank; record date for bondholders was 18.02.2026.
news.summary:
HUDCO confirms Rs. 206.8 Cr interest payment for 2011 Tax-Free Bonds Series 2 on 05.03.2026.
Payment processed via IDFC First Bank; record date for bondholders was 18.02.2026.

news.title:
Nifty opened below 25,600, with Sensex down 360 points.
HUDCO and One Mobikwik are in focus during market opening.
news.summary:
Nifty opened below 25,600, with Sensex down 360 points.
HUDCO and One Mobikwik are in focus during market opening.

news.title:
BSE will remove HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Tech, and Torrent Pharma from F&O segment.
No new contracts for these stocks will be introduced from May 4, 2026.
news.summary:
BSE will remove HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Tech, and Torrent Pharma from F&O segment.
No new contracts for these stocks will be introduced from May 4, 2026.

news.title: HUDCO aims to achieve a 3% Net Interest Margin by FY26, per CNBC TV18.
news.summary: HUDCO aims to achieve a 3% Net Interest Margin by FY26, per CNBC TV18.

news.title:
HUDCO confirmed timely payment of Rs. 97.7 cr interest on Tax-Free Bonds 2012 Tranche on 16.02.2026.
Payment was made via ICICI Bank to bondholders as per record date 23.01.2026, fulfilling SEBI LODR Regulation 57.
news.summary:
HUDCO confirmed timely payment of Rs. 97.7 cr interest on Tax-Free Bonds 2012 Tranche on 16.02.2026.
Payment was made via ICICI Bank to bondholders as per record date 23.01.2026, fulfilling SEBI LODR Regulation 57.

news.title: Hudco plans to raise ₹14.42 bln through debentures to boost finances.
news.summary: Hudco plans to raise ₹14.42 bln through debentures to boost finances.

news.title:
HUDCO approves Rs.1442 crore perpetual debentures under Series 1, 2025-26.
Debentures carry a 7.87% coupon, with first interest payment on 13.02.2027.
news.summary:
HUDCO approves Rs.1442 crore perpetual debentures under Series 1, 2025-26.
Debentures carry a 7.87% coupon, with first interest payment on 13.02.2027.

news.title:
Fitch affirms HUDCO's long-term issuer rating at BBB with a stable outlook, linked to India's sovereign rating.
HUDCO's rating reflects strong government backing, improved asset quality, and robust profitability.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms HUDCO's long-term issuer rating at BBB with a stable outlook, linked to India's sovereign rating.
HUDCO's rating reflects strong government backing, improved asset quality, and robust profitability.
